title: OPD's Better Mace
description: A resourcepack that makes the Mace look way better, but not just slapping a Heavy Core with a 2D Breeze Rod and calling it a day.
body:
# OPD's Better Mace

A resourcepack that makes the mace look way better and 3D, but without slapping the Heavy Core and a 2D Breeze Rod and calling it a day.

I've taken the Mace and took it to a more hammer-like design, thought it was a good fit because mojang made the Mace much slower and its ability to launch back entities that are near the slam.

It has the Heavy Core and a 3D Breeze Rod (Taking the model and main texture design from the Brewing Stand), but then it has an extension to the Heavy Core, making it look more menacing and not looking like a block on a stick.

This resource pack does NOT need any additional mods, just vanilla Minecraft

## Future Plans
Enchantment Model Changes -
Enchantments make the Mace change its look.

## Other Things/License Stuff
Can be used in any form of content, but credit is required. Can also be edited, but not reuploaded without permission.
